title: Star Wars (2015) 50
content:
{{Top|rwm|aor|title=''Star Wars'' (2015) 50}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars 50}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:StarWars2015-50.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars'' 50 |writer=[[Kieron Gillen]] |penciller=*[[Giuseppe Camuncoli]] *[[Salvador Larroca]] |inker=*[[Cam Smith]] *Salvador Larroca |letterer=[[Clayton Cowles]] |colorist=[[Guru-eFX]] |cover artist=[[Travis Charest]] |editor=[[Mark Paniccia]] |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[July 4]], [[2018]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/69553/star_wars_2015_50|text=Star Wars (2015) #50}} |pages=45 |upc=759606081134 |timeline=[[1 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''Star Wars'' (2015) 50 to [[1 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'' (2015)]] |issue=50 }} {{Quote|…the next arc begins in issue #50. Issue #50 is going to be this very, very big story that my entire run centers around. "Mutiny at Mon Cala" is the lead-in to something kind of cataclysmic and huge in scale.|Kieron Gillen|{{SW|url=news/kieron-gillen-chats-about-the-past-present-and-future-of-marvels-star-wars|text=Kieron Gillen Chats About the Past, Present, and Future of Marvel's ''Star Wars''}}}} '''''Star Wars'' 50''' is a [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] by [[Kieron Gillen]]. Gillen described the issue as a "big story" that his "entire run centers around." It followed the [[Star Wars Book X: Mutiny at Mon Cala|''Mutiny at Mon Cala'']] arc, which led into ''Star Wars'' 50 in a cataclysmic way. It was published on [[July 4]], [[2018]]. The issue also includes a backup story titled "[[Shu-Torun Lives]]." ==Publisher's summary== ''IN THIS ISSUE…HOPE DIES. The REBEL FLEET is completed. It's magnificent. It's beautiful. It's secret. But no secret is kept for long from DARTH VADER. The most epic story yet done in a ''STAR WARS'' comic begins here. Prepare to witness the Empire TRULY strike back.'' ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=HOPE DIES
Part I |text=The murder of their beloved king at the hands of the evil Empire has inspired open revolt on Mon Cala! Thanks to a timely counterattack by Admiral Ackbar as well as the heroics of Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia and Han Solo, the Mon Calamari's powerful fleet now stands ready to fight for peace and justice with the Rebel Alliance. Armed with new ships and new allies, the Rebellion is finally poised to take back the galaxy from the Empire in earnest. But the Rebels also owe their recent victory to Queen Trios of Shu-Torun and her defection to their cause. But Trios may have plans of her own....}} ==Plot summary== On the Mako-Ta rebel base, [[Mon Mothma]] and Leia reflect on the Rebellion's success in freeing the [[Mon Calamari]]. Leia excuses herself to check on Queen Trios, who seems to be enjoying her time but confesses she is a pampered monarch with no personal skills. Meanwhile, on the [[Ring of Kafrene]], Han Solo and Chewbacca wrap up a negotiation with help from C-3PO acting as a translator. After leaving, they realize they are being chased by bounty hunters, but Han and Chewbacca lose them by hiding behind an entrance point. Luke arrives at the Mako-Ta base for the celebration. The rebel fleet is celebrating Leia's efforts by putting on a spectacle that includes Luke piloting his X-Wing. [[General]] [[Jan Dodonna]] tells Luke that the Rebellion's fleet must be used strategically, as they cannot win a war of attrition. During her speech, Mon Mothma calls the rebel fleet a "hidden blade" that will be deployed where it's needed most. The ships try to leave but their engines fail. Leia realizes Queen Trios left during the speech and grows suspicious. Suddenly, several Star Destroyers arrive from hyperspace.Darth Vader orders his boarding parties to wait, explaining that he wants to give the rebels time to feel fear before the attack. The rebels realize their comms, artillery batteries, engines, and hangar bay doors are all disabled. Aboard Vader's Star Destroyer, Queen Trios drinks wine while watching, but in a moment of shame, she throws the drink away. Vader senses the rebels' dramatic change in hope and believes he can now end the Rebellion. ==Continuity== The issue places the [[Ring of Kafrene]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories]], whereas ''[[Star Wars: Rogue One: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' places it in the [[Expansion Region]]. However, the [[Star Wars Vol. 9: Hope Dies|trade paperback]] places the Ring of Kafrene in the Expansion Region. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars (2015) 50}} ===Editions===
